system.description:
Prerequisite: DEX 9+

The character is extremely flexible and can squeeze or fold their body in a manner atypical of humans. The character may throw DEX 10+ to escape from bonds or chains or to slip through bars or portcullises.

If they fail, they may reattempt the roll only if something has changed: they've been thrown on their backs, or if they have been moved to a new location, for example.
